title: Services | Piel en Armonia
description: Editorial catalogue of dermatology routes with high-hierarchy corporate structure.
heading: Programs & Protocols

heroImage.alt: Medical team and dermatology analytics technology

introTitle: Dermatology decisions with clinical rigor and contemporary execution
introDeck: Each block connects patient need, medical reading, and next action so you can move forward with clarity and continuity.

featured.title: Precision diagnosis unit
featured.copy: Integrated skin, hair, and nail reading to decide with evidence from the first consultation.

featured.title: Phototype-calibrated therapies
featured.copy: Laser and renewal protocols with traceable parameters aligned to each skin objective.

featured.title: Hybrid in-clinic and remote route
featured.copy: Telemedicine triage and in-clinic escalation based on clinical priority.

sections.title: Core Clinical Routes
sections.deck: Assessment and control of frequent conditions with medical reading and phased follow-up.

cards.title: Comprehensive diagnosis
cards.copy: Skin, hair, and nail assessment to define a full plan.

cards.title: Skin cancer
cards.copy: Early review of suspicious or changing lesions.

sections.title: Technology & Rejuvenation
sections.deck: Traceable interventions to improve texture, tone, and structural skin support.

cards.title: Dermatology laser
cards.copy: Traceable medical parameters for lesion, phototype, and target.

cards.title: Chemical peel
cards.copy: Skin renewal through formula selection by clinical profile.

cards.title: Collagen biostimulators
cards.copy: Support skin firmness with responsible indication criteria.

sections.title: Extended Programs
sections.deck: Continuity pathways for family care, mixed cases, and remote clinical guidance.

cards.title: Pediatric dermatology
cards.copy: Care for children and teenagers with clear family guidance.

cards.title: Skin, hair and nails
cards.copy: Cross-route coverage for mixed or evolving conditions.

cards.title: Telemedicine
cards.copy: Initial digital orientation with escalation to clinic.

initiatives.title: Clinical photo route
initiatives.copy: Capture standard for comparative follow-up at every review point.

initiatives.title: Quarterly follow-up
initiatives.copy: Preventive block for patients with recurrent disease history.

initiatives.title: Family pathway
initiatives.copy: Structured support protocol for dermatology decisions at home.

initiatives.title: Lesion mapping
initiatives.copy: Sequential reading to prioritize in-clinic review and follow-up.

initiatives.title: Calibrated session
initiatives.copy: Laser parameter tuning based on response and skin tolerance.

initiatives.title: Support plan
initiatives.copy: Combined sequence to improve texture and firmness progressively.

initiatives.title: Operational policies

initiatives.title: Remote escalation
initiatives.copy: Criteria to decide when to continue online and when to move in-clinic.
